title: Old Growth Forest
description: Introduces an Oak counterpart to the Old Growth biome collection
body:
![Old Growth Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/khWpmrMO/images/6bec6d4720a638ff6886defc28195cddbc4e1f64.png)

![Environment](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-server%20or%20singleplayer-00AF5C)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/807935906055979039?logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=discord&color=6577E6
)
](https://discord.gg/HermTPzzG3)
[![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UC4kkLkiJTtmlTCuFExqtFKA?style=flat&logo=youtube&label=youtube&color=FF323D)](https://www.youtube.com/@flamesatgames)
[![Patreon](https://img.shields.io/endpoint.svg?url=https%3A%2F%2Fshieldsio-patreon.vercel.app%2Fapi%3Fusername%3Dflamesatgames%26type%3Dpatrons&style=flat)](https://patreon.com/flamesatgames)

**Old Growth Forest** simply adds an uncommon Forest variant with large trees. This biome has a chance to replace regular Forests at high enough "Weirdness" values, which is the same generation criteria for Old Growth Birch Forests, Old Growth Pine Taigas and Old Growth Spruce Taigas.
Please note: Project is currently in Beta.
